intentSynonyms: show me my page attachments in confluence
view my page attachments in confluence
see all my page attachments in confluence
list attachments on a page in confluence
description: List attachments on a Confluence page. Returns file names, sizes, and download URLs.

page_id.description: Page ID to list attachments for

limit.description: Maximum number of attachments to return (default 25, max 250)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
